name: design-system-nvidia
title: NVIDIA
description: GPU computing. Green-black energy, technical power aesthetic.

description_i18n.zh-TW: GPU 運算。綠黑配色，技術力量美學。

description_i18n.pl: Obliczenia GPU. Zielono-czarna energia, estetyka technicznej mocy.

description_i18n.en: GPU computing. Green-black energy, technical power aesthetic.

query.en: Generate a {{artifactKind}} using the NVIDIA design system. Stay faithful to its colour palette, typography, spacing, iconography, and component vocabulary as documented in DESIGN.md.
